'''yajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:learnedly|learnedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:learnedly|learnedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yajate|yajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yajatesher|yajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yajatesherĂ«m|yajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yajatero|yajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yajateshĂ«|yajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yajateshĂ«m|yajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyajatero|gokiyajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyajateshĂ«|gokiyajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyajateshĂ«m|gokiyajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyajankerom|goyajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyajankeshĂ«|goyajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyajankeshĂ«m|goyajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyajankeya|goyajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yajaterom|yajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yajatemu|yajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yajateya|yajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyajaterom|gokiyajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyajatemu|gokiyajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyajateya|gokiyajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yajajate|yajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yajajatesher|yajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yajajatesherĂ«m|yajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yajajatero|yajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yajajateshĂ«|yajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yajajateshĂ«m|yajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyajajatero|gokiyajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyajajateshĂ«|gokiyajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyajajateshĂ«m|gokiyajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyajajankerom|goyajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyajajankeshĂ«|goyajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyajajankeshĂ«m|goyajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyajajankeya|goyajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yajajaterom|yajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yajajatemu|yajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yajajateya|yajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyajajaterom|gokiyajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyajajatemu|gokiyajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyajajateya|gokiyajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠjĂŠte|yĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠjĂŠtesher|yĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠjĂŠtero|yĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠjĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠjĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠjĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠjĂŠterom|yĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠjĂŠtemu|yĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠjĂŠteya|yĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠjĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠjĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafjafte|yafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafjaftesher|yafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafjaftesherĂ«m|yafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafjaftero|yafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafjafteshĂ«|yafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafjafteshĂ«m|yafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafjaftero|gokiyafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafjafteshĂ«|gokiyafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafjafteshĂ«m|gokiyafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafjafnkerom|goyafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafjafnkeshĂ«|goyafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafjafnkeshĂ«m|goyafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafjafnkeya|goyafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafjafterom|yafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafjaftemu|yafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafjafteya|yafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafjafterom|gokiyafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafjaftemu|gokiyafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafjafteya|gokiyafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
